share.share_text:
HOW DO WE RATE JOSHâS FORM?? 

Are you gym-curious? Wanting to start a bit of a health kick in a comfortable space, while also incorporating beer? Gym Stuff for Non-Gym People might be the event youâve been looking forâ¦

On Saturday, Feb 28th from 11am - 1pm, the team from Valkyrie Gym will turn the Oak into a place of exercise, teaching basic and practical gym techniques to the soundtrack of music by DJ Bonnie Ann.

Youâll get a free Young Henrys or Heaps Normal on arrival, and youâll leave with a four-week exercise plan.

Perfect excuse to skip work for the day!

Tickets are $30 (or a small donation) with proceeds going to ACON Hunter. Hit the link in bio to grab a ticket!

share.share_text:
172 and MOST of them were in the last 6 months ð¤¯â¤ï¸ This year has been a big shakeup career and life wise lol. We bought a house, and I also stopped working 9-5. 

I am INCREDIBLY blessed. To the venues and organisers who have welcomed me into Newyâs gig economy with open arms and ALL of the support, please know how grateful I am ð©· 

My music bingo and trivia nights have been life changing. Itâs such a privilege to get to meet so many people and facilitate a fun yet lowkey evening out. Thank you to everyone who has come out and supported one of my nights, they wouldnât happen without you â­ï¸

Big shoutout to @theoak.tigheshill - we will be celebrating ONE YEAR of music bingo in Feb?! ð¥° 

Come out before the year is through for a DJ set or a cheeky game of trivia â¤ï¸ Iâd love to see you! 

#DJ 
#NewcastleNSW 
#Alternative 
#MusicBingo 
#Trivia

SUN DEC 21â¨â¢ Vinyl Set at The Oak â pre-Christmas treats, 2â6pm in the Aquarium

Dress code: Spectacular (my set is on 8-9pm) â¨ ðï¸â¨â¢ Bernieâs Laneway Party â Iâm bringing in the New Year from 10pmâ12am!! Featuring Orlando Gloom, Miss Stress, Deirdre Doo, Oda Mae Clown & more ð­ðï¸

As you can tell, things have been pretty busy around these parts - and I couldnât be happier ð¥¹ð Thank you to anyone who has caught a set, played some trivia or swung round for some wholesome colouring in. My heart skips a beat whenever I see your face irl. This month, thereâs Halloween festivities, heaps of slay bangers to be heard and loads of chill activities to share with your friends ð¶ð

All of these gigs are happening across Muloobinba, the unceded lands of the Awabakal and Worimi people. I pay my deepest respects to their elders past, present and emerging. It always was and always will be Aboriginal land.

share.share_text:
Tomorrow night, my big brother @benleecemusic is playing one last gig with his kick ass band Left of the Dial at The Oak so I wanted to share this treasured memory from TCMF in January featuring The Ferrells â­ï¸ 

Itâs hard to put into words how much of an impact Benâs music has had on me and so many others, so selfishly Iâm hoping this hiatus doesnât last forever. His songs carry a rare kind of honesty, the kind of grit that encourages you to be brave, and the heart that keeps you coming back. 

So, if youâve ever been moved by a BL lyric, lifted by a live show, or felt seen by his music - donât miss this. Nowâs our chance to return the favour and send him off the best way we can: surrounded by mates, beer in hand, singing every word. ðâ¨

JULY ROUND-UP ð¿â¨
Spinning tunes and slinging bangers! Catch me at:
ð§ Gender Blender â CDJ set @ Bernieâs Bar, Saturday 12 from 9PM
ð Sunday Sesh â CDJ set @ The Hamo, Sunday 13 from 10PM
ð¶ Music Bingo Mondays â Vinyl vibes @ The Oak, every Monday from 7PM
ðº 70s Vinyl Disco set â Good Folk Brewing Co, Friday 18 from 6PM

Sparkles, grooves and whimsy â you know the drill. Letâs dance. ðª©ð¥ 

ð¸ @katvalentinephotography 

#NewcastleNSW #MusicBingo #Vinyl #VinylDJ #DJ

Last night we raised $781 for ACON and MINUS18 for Sweat With Pride at my music bingo night at The Oak! ð¥¹ðºð»

That brings us to a grand total of $1409 going directly to funding health and life affirming resources, events and care for our rainbow community. 

I wouldnât have been able to reach this goal without your incredibly generous donations and a raffle with a prize pool made up of goodies from legend status businesses and creatives including  @alejandro_lauren_ , @cakeboinewy @bettylovesbooks_bookshop  @thepressbookhouse , @rudderlessrecordstore, @toprockdancestudios AND @valkyrienewcastle who IMO constantly spread love throughout our community in so many ways. You should check out every single one of those pages ð¥°

Thank you to @danbeazley who took the reins last night selling tickets and to @dunnydundundun and the @theoak.tigheshill crew for hosting us each week and encouraging this beautiful community to blossom ð©·

Thank you so much to everyone who came out, dressed up and boogied hard! Iâm so grateful for your support. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for helping me reach and exceed my goal.

So much love!
Bonnie x

share.share_text:
SWEAT WITH PRIDE FUNDRAISER at The Oak ð³ï¸âð
Iâm bringing the heat and the love to The Oak with a big, bold, and beautiful night to raise funds for Sweat With Pride â an initiative supporting the health and wellbeing of the LGBTQIA+ community through movement and visibility ðªð½ð

Whatâs happening:
* Pride Power Halfa â Join in for a fun-filled group movement session. No pressure: just sweat, sparkles, and solidarity!â¨
* Music Bingo â my weekly music bingo with an extra special theme of âlove yourselfâ. Boogie-ready tunes that will lift you up.â¨
* Dress Up & Glow Up â Come in your brightest, loudest, most fabulous gear. Strut your stuff on the runway. Best-dressed prizes up for grabs.â¨
* Raffle Extravaganza â Support a great cause and go in the draw to win epic prizes from local businesses like Cake Boi, Valkyrie Gym, Betty Loves Books, Top Rock Dance Studio AND Rudderless Records!

Where the money is going:
This month, a whole heap of Sweaty Bettyâs are getting their sweat on every day to raise funds for life-changing support services for rainbow communities in Australia as part of Sweat With Pride. Brought to you by Rainbow Giving Australia, funding projects in partnership with ACON and Minus18. By sweating it out and showing up, youâre helping make real change.

ð Venue: The Oak, Tighes Hillâ¨ ð Date & Time: June 30â¨ ð Entry: Free with raffle
